Velocity.
Legal

Terms of
Service.

Effective: April 2026 — Velocity™ by Calyvent
TermsPrivacy

These Terms of Service form a binding agreement between you (“Client”) and Calyvent (“Velocity,” “we,” “us”), operating the Velocity digital atelier at velocity.calyvent.com. By submitting a brief, making payment, or engaging our services in any form, you accept these Terms in full.

1. The Nature of Our Engagement

Velocity provides bespoke website design and development on a commission basis. No templates are used. The work we deliver is designed and built specifically for you, beginning only after your brief has been reviewed, accepted, and payment confirmed.

Accepting a brief does not guarantee a project will proceed. We reserve the right to decline any commission at our sole discretion, including after initial acceptance if circumstances change. A full refund will be issued in such cases.

2. The Brief & Scope

Your project scope is defined by the brief submitted through our onboarding system. Once payment is confirmed and work begins, the brief is locked. Changes to scope after this point may extend the timeline, incur additional fees agreed upon in writing, or in significant cases require a new commission.

It is your responsibility to ensure the brief is accurate and complete. We build what you describe — if information is incomplete or inaccurate, the outcome will reflect that.

3. Payment

All payments are processed in United States Dollars via Stripe, Inc. Payment is due in full before work begins. All transactions are final upon processing. We accept credit cards, debit cards, Apple Pay, and Google Pay.

4. Refund Policy

  • If we decline your project after payment — communicated within 48 hours — you receive a full refund.
  • After work begins: No refund. Our time and studio resources are committed from the moment work starts.
  • After final delivery: No refund. Once deliverables have been provided and the site is live, the commission is complete.

Refund requests must be submitted in writing to client@calyvent.com.

If you believe your circumstances warrant consideration, write to us at client@calyvent.com explaining the situation in full. We evaluate on a case-by-case basis. We do not guarantee any outcome, but we commit to a fair reading of every request.

5. Delivery

Timelines are estimates. Delivery may be affected by delays in client-provided content or feedback, scope changes after work begins, or circumstances outside our reasonable control. Delays attributable to the client do not entitle the client to a refund.

A rush fee applies to projects with a deadline under 7 days from submission. This will be communicated before work begins.

6. Revisions

Each commission includes two rounds of revisions unless otherwise agreed in writing. A revision round is a single consolidated set of feedback submitted at one time. Additional rounds are available at a rate communicated and billed before implementation.

7. Intellectual Property

Upon receipt of full payment, all rights to the custom website code and design transfer to you. This excludes open-source libraries, third-party licensed assets, Velocity’s internal tools, and the Velocity and Calyvent names and trademarks.

Until full payment is received, all work-in-progress remains the intellectual property of Calyvent. We retain the right to reference completed work in our portfolio unless you submit a written opt-out request within 30 days of delivery.

8. Confidentiality

All information submitted through our onboarding system — personal details, business information, creative direction, financial data, project specifics — is treated as strictly confidential. It is used only for your commission and internal records. It is never sold, shared, or disclosed except where required by law.

9. Client Responsibilities

You agree to provide accurate information, supply required assets in a timely manner, ensure all provided content does not infringe third-party rights, provide feedback within 5 business days per round, and confirm you have authority to engage and pay on behalf of any business entity named in the brief. Submitting false or misleading information is grounds for immediate termination without refund.

10. Domain & Hosting

If domain registration or DNS configuration is included: registration fees are passed through at cost and are non-refundable once registered; you receive full domain control upon completion; ongoing hosting and renewal costs are your responsibility after handover.

11. Data & Privacy

The handling of personal data is governed by our Privacy Policy, incorporated into these Terms by reference. By submitting a brief, you consent to the collection and processing of your information as described therein.

12. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, Calyvent and its principals shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages. Our total aggregate liability shall not exceed the total amount you paid for the specific commission giving rise to the claim. We make no guarantees regarding search rankings, traffic, or business outcomes.

13. Warranties

We warrant that work delivered will be original, custom-built, and free from known defects at the time of delivery. Beyond this, services are provided on an “as is” basis.

14. Governing Law & Disputes

These Terms are governed by the laws of the United States. Disputes shall first be attempted through good-faith negotiation. If unresolved within 30 days, disputes shall proceed to binding arbitration under the rules of the American Arbitration Association, conducted in English and kept confidential.

15. Modifications

We may update these Terms at any time. Material changes will be communicated to clients with active commissions. The current version is always at velocity.calyvent.com/terms.html.

16. Entire Agreement

These Terms, together with any written project agreements and our Privacy Policy, constitute the entire agreement between you and Velocity by Calyvent, superseding all prior communications.

Questions? Write to client@calyvent.com — we respond within 24 hours.

© 2026 Velocity by Calyvent
